description_long: This is a round, woven picnic basket with a distinctive circular pattern on its flat faces, featuring alternating bands of natural beige and reddish-pink hues. The basket is constructed with a tightly interlaced weave, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance. A single, long, red strap is attached to the sides, allowing the basket to be carried over the shoulder. The sides of the basket are slightly convex, and the weave pattern continues seamlessly around the circumference. There is no visible lid or closure mechanism, suggesting an open-top design. The overall look is both functional and decorative, suitable for carrying food or personal items in an urban park or outdoor setting.
description: A round, woven picnic basket with a red shoulder strap and a decorative circular pattern in beige and reddish-pink. The basket is open-topped and features a tightly interlaced weave.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular woven face with concentric beige and reddish-pink bands and the red strap draped across.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the basket's narrow profile, the thickness of the woven body, and the attachment of the red strap.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same circular woven pattern and visible strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, highlighting the basket's slim edge and the way the strap curves along the side.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed shoulder strap, made of synthetic material, attached at both sides of the basket.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tightly woven plain weave with concentric circular bands, alternating beige and reddish-pink, creating a decorative bullseye effect.
